specific_question: Does MediConn Solutions have any CRM system requirements that are unique to Canada that would help business growth into 2026?
answer: Yes. Since MediConn Solutions is based in Canada, certain CRM systems functions are required that would not be necessary in other countries. These CRM requirements were established fully in July 2014, by the Canadian government. These 3 requirements are necessary: attention to all legal compliance, patient data must be stored within Canadian borders, and information must be available in both French and English.
dr_question: According to an article in WTT Solutions in March 2025, Customer Relations Management (CRM) is an important component of any healthcare business plan. What would a business development representative look for in CRM software that would contribute to MediConn Solutions' business growth in 2026?
